spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_BURST_LEN
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA BURST LEN

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ID_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ID WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ADDR WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA DATA WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_AWUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA AWUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of User Write Address Bus

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ARUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ARUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of User Read Address Bus

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_WUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA WUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of User Write Data Bus

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_RUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA RUSER WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of User Read Data Bus

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_BUSER_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA BUSER WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_START_DATA_VALUE
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT START DATA VALUE
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: The master will start generating data from the C_M_START_DATA_VALUE value

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_TARGET_SLAVE_BASE_ADDR
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT TARGET SLAVE BASE ADDR
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: The master requires a target slave base address. -- The master will initiate read and write transactions on the slave with base address specified here as a parameter.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT ADDR WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of M_AXI address bus. -- The master generates the read and write addresses of width specified as C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH.

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT DATA WIDTH
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Width of M_AXI data bus. -- The master issues write data and accept read data where the width of the data bus is C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH

spirit:modelParameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_TRANSACTIONS_NUM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT TRANSACTIONS NUM
spirit:modelParameter.spirit:description: Transaction number is the number of write -- and read transactions the master will perform as a part of this example memory test.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_BURST_LEN
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA BURST LEN

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ID_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ID WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ADDR WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA DATA WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_AWUSER_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA AWUSER WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of User Write Address Bus

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_ARUSER_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA ARUSER WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of User Read Address Bus

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_WUSER_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA WUSER WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of User Write Data Bus

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_RUSER_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA RUSER WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of User Read Data Bus

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_DMA_BUSER_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI DMA BUSER WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_START_DATA_VALUE
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT START DATA VALUE
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: The master will start generating data from the C_M_START_DATA_VALUE value

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_TARGET_SLAVE_BASE_ADDR
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT TARGET SLAVE BASE ADDR
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: The master requires a target slave base address. -- The master will initiate read and write transactions on the slave with base address specified here as a parameter.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_ADDR_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT ADDR WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of M_AXI address bus. -- The master generates the read and write addresses of width specified as C_M_AXI_ADDR_WIDTH.

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_DATA_WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT DATA WIDTH
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Width of M_AXI data bus. -- The master issues write data and accept read data where the width of the data bus is C_M_AXI_DATA_WIDTH

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: C_M_AXI_AUDIO_OUT_TRANSACTIONS_NUM
spirit:parameter.spirit:displayName: C M AXI AUDIO OUT TRANSACTIONS NUM
spirit:parameter.spirit:description: Transaction number is the number of write -- and read transactions the master will perform as a part of this example memory test.
